insights: The market is currently in a consolidation phase, with the 7-day average (1387) slightly outpacing the 30-day average (1362), suggesting mild upward momentum.
Unicorn and FAANG+ hiring tiers remain stable, acting as a floor for the market while smaller companies show higher volatility in job postings.
Specialized roles like Infrastructure/SRE and Data Engineering are seeing a slight contraction, while core Software Engineering and Data/ML roles remain the primary drivers of volume.
